verses.text: The elder to beloved Gaius; 'I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth.' Soul-prosperity. He prays body match the thriving soul.
The elder to beloved Gaius; 'I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth.' Soul-prosperity. He prays body match the thriving soul.
He rejoiced that Gaius walked in truth; 'I have no greater joy than to hear that my children walk in truth.' Greatest joy. A teacher's delight is faithful children.
He rejoiced that Gaius walked in truth; 'I have no greater joy than to hear that my children walk in truth.' Greatest joy. A teacher's delight is faithful children.
Gaius does faithfully in helping the brethren and strangers; we ought 'to receive such, that we might be fellowhelpers to the truth.' Support workers. Helping gospel labourers shares their work.
Gaius does faithfully in helping the brethren and strangers; we ought 'to receive such, that we might be fellowhelpers to the truth.' Support workers. Helping gospel labourers shares their work.
Gaius does faithfully in helping the brethren and strangers; we ought 'to receive such, that we might be fellowhelpers to the truth.' Support workers. Helping gospel labourers shares their work.
Gaius does faithfully in helping the brethren and strangers; we ought 'to receive such, that we might be fellowhelpers to the truth.' Support workers. Helping gospel labourers shares their work.
Diotrephes, 'who loveth to have the preeminence,' rejects the brethren and casts them out. Proud rejecter. Ambition for first place harms the church.
Diotrephes, 'who loveth to have the preeminence,' rejects the brethren and casts them out. Proud rejecter. Ambition for first place harms the church.
'Follow not that which is evil, but that which is good'; Demetrius has good report of all. Imitate good. Good men leave a good witness.
'Follow not that which is evil, but that which is good'; Demetrius has good report of all. Imitate good. Good men leave a good witness.
Having much to write, he would rather speak 'face to face.' Peace be to thee. Farewell. He closes longing to see them.
